def check_permission(role):
    if role == "admin" or role == "moderator" or role == "editor" or role == "superuser":
        return True
    return False


def is_valid_status(status):
    if status == "active" or status == "pending" or status == "suspended" or status == "trial":
        return True
    return False


def get_priority_level(priority):
    if priority == "critical" or priority == "high" or priority == "urgent":
        return "escalate"
    elif priority == "medium" or priority == "normal" or priority == "standard":
        return "queue"
    else:
        return "defer"


def classify_response(code):
    if code == 200 or code == 201 or code == 202 or code == 204:
        return "success"
    if code == 400 or code == 401 or code == 403 or code == 404:
        return "client_error"
    return "server_error"
